privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Regression Therapy
privacy.description: The privacy policy of the regression therapy website. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy describes how information you provide is collected, used, and protected when you use our website and regression therapy services.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.text:
We collect information that you voluntarily provide to us when:
- You fill out the contact form on our website
- You book a regression therapy session
- You subscribe to our newsletter
- You communicate with us via email or messengers
The information we collect may include your name, email address, phone number, and the content of the messages you send us.

usage.title: 2. Use of Information
usage.text:
We use the collected information to:
- Provide regression therapy services
- Respond to your inquiries and questions
- Improve our website and services
- Send informational materials if you have consented
- Manage administrative tasks related to our services

protection.title: 3. Information Protection
protection.text:
We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. We are committed to:
- Keeping your information in a secure environment
- Restricting access to your personal information
- Regularly reviewing and improving our data collection, storage, and processing practices

confidentiality.title: 4. Session Confidentiality
confidentiality.text: All information discussed during regression therapy sessions is strictly confidential. We do not disclose session content to third parties without your explicit consent, except as required by the laws of Ukraine.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.text: Our website may use cookies to enhance your user experience. You can set your browser to refuse all or some cookies, or to notify you when websites set or access cookies.

externalLinks.title: 6. Third-Party Links
externalLinks.text: Our website may contain links to other websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such third-party sites.

policyChanges.title: 7. Changes to the Privacy Policy
policyChanges.text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights
yourRights.text:
You have the right to:
- Access your personal data
- Correct inaccuracies
- Delete your personal data
- Object to processing
- Restrict processing
- Receive your data in a structured format

contactInfo.title: 9. Contact Information
contactInfo.text:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
Email: 265840@gmail.com
Phone: +380 97 176 81 96
